parameters.query:
-- Find sellers matching product type
SELECT 
  g.user_uid,
  g.name,
  g.email,
  g.phone,
  g.specialty,
  g.location,
  g.capacity_kg,
  g.rating,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) as available_slots_count
FROM growers g
LEFT JOIN availability_slots a 
  ON g.user_uid = a.seller_uid 
  AND a.is_available = TRUE
  AND a.available_date >= CURRENT_DATE
WHERE g.role = 'SELLER'
  AND g.specialty ILIKE '%{{ $json.body.productType }}%'
GROUP BY g.user_uid, g.name, g.email, g.phone, g.specialty, g.location, g.capacity_kg, g.rating
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) > 0
ORDER BY g.rating DESC, g.capacity_kg DESC
LIMIT 3;

-- Get available slots for each seller
SELECT 
  a.id as slot_id,
  a.seller_uid,
  a.available_date,
  a.start_time,
  a.end_time,
  a.duration_minutes,
  a.is_available
FROM availability_slots a
WHERE a.seller_uid IN (
  SELECT g.user_uid 
  FROM growers g
  WHERE g.role = 'SELLER'
    AND g.specialty ILIKE '%{{ $json.body.productType }}%'
  LIMIT 3
)
AND a.is_available = TRUE
AND a.available_date >= CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY a.seller_uid, a.available_date ASC, a.start_time ASC;

-- Get availability for specific seller
SELECT 
  a.id as slot_id,
  a.seller_uid,
  a.available_date,
  a.start_time,
  a.end_time,
  a.duration_minutes,
  a.is_available,
  g.name as seller_name
FROM availability_slots a
JOIN growers g ON a.seller_uid = g.user_uid
WHERE a.seller_uid = '{{ $json.body.sellerId }}'
  AND a.is_available = TRUE
  AND a.available_date >= CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY a.available_date ASC, a.start_time ASC
LIMIT 50;

-- Check slot availability
SELECT id, seller_uid, is_available 
FROM availability_slots 
WHERE id = '{{ $json.body.slotId }}'::UUID
AND is_available = TRUE;

-- Create appointment
INSERT INTO appointments (
  buyer_uid, buyer_name, buyer_email, buyer_phone,
  seller_uid, seller_name,
  product_type, quantity_kg,
  scheduled_time, location, status, meeting_type, notes
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.body.buyerUid }}',
  '{{ $json.body.buyerName }}',
  '{{ $json.body.buyerEmail }}',
  '{{ $json.body.buyerPhone }}',
  '{{ $json.body.sellerUid }}',
  '{{ $json.body.sellerName }}',
  '{{ $json.body.productType }}',
  {{ $json.body.quantity }},
  '{{ $json.body.scheduledTime }}'::TIMESTAMP,
  '{{ $json.body.location }}',
  'pending',
  '{{ $json.body.meetingType || "consultation" }}',
  '{{ $json.body.notes || "" }}'
)
RETURNING *;

-- Mark slot as booked
UPDATE availability_slots 
SET 
  is_available = FALSE,
  booked_by = '{{ $json.body.buyerUid }}',
  appointment_id = '{{ $('Create Appointment').item.json.id }}'::UUID,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = '{{ $json.body.slotId }}'::UUID
RETURNING *;
